name: frGetConfiguration
title: frGetConfiguration
description: This function copies the FlexRay protocol parameters to <configuration var>.

parameters.name: <configuration var>
parameters.description: Name of the variable referenced by the configuration object. The variable name was defined when the object was created using frConfiguration.

description: The following CAPL function outputs all FlexRay protocol parameters in the Write Window.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
